title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: Google DeepMind's WeatherNext AI model successfully predicted the intensity and track of Hurricane Melissa in October 2025 several days in advance. This enabled meteorologists and authorities to issue evacuation warnings and protect vulnerable communities before the Category 5 storm made landfall in Jamaica.
